title: Summer Skills Camp 2026
description: 3-day intensive camp covering shooting, ball handling, and game IQ. Open to ages 10–18.

title: Elite Shooting Clinic
description: Half-day clinic focused on form, range, and off-the-dribble shooting. Limited slots available.

title: Clinic Invitational Tournament
description: Friendly tournament for clinic players to apply skills in game situations. Teams formed by age group.

title: Open Court Training Day
description: Community training day — drills, scrimmages, and fellowship for all JSkills athletes and families.
